title: Benchmark run record (per attempt)
description: Top-level metadata for one (task, attempt) under a run directory. Pairs with score.json and stats.json. The run directory layout: runs/<UTC-ts>-<benchmark>-<backend>/<task-id-slug>/<attempt>/ contains run-record.json + score.json + stats.json + transcript + diff.

prompt.description: Canonical prompt the harness handed to the backend (output of adapter.prompt_for). Always written to disk by the runner; sha256 lets reports detect prompt drift across runs.

path.description: Path to the prompt artifact, relative to the attempt directory (typically 'prompt.md').

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the prompt bytes, lowercase hex.

effective_prompt.description: The prompt the backend actually sent to the model after any wrapping (Claude Code's system prompt, adapter-added framing, etc.). Optional — backends that do not wrap omit this. When present, the path is relative to the attempt directory.

model_output_path.description: Path (relative to attempt dir) to the model's raw text output. Distinct from a backend-specific structured transcript. May be null for backends that only mutate the worktree.
